text.title: GCP Cloud Storage Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: add CMEK with rotation ≤ 90d before allowing writers
add at least one transition or delete rule
enable uniform bucket-level access before writers

text.example: preconditions == false -> production_data == true && cmek_key == null -> lifecycle_rules.length == 0 -> conclusion ref.
